summary: Tested new features: Risk Profiler (8-question questionnaire with results), BAS Calculator (GST worksheet, PAYG withholding, PAYG instalments, summary tabs), Collaboration (team management, activity log, notes, permissions tabs), Statement of Advice (SOA form with 8 sections). All features working correctly. Navigation sidebar includes new 'Adviser Tools' section with Collaboration and SOA Generator. Sidebar scroll position preservation still has timing issue.

issues: Sidebar scroll position resets to 0 after page navigation despite setTimeout(20ms) fix - timing issue persists

passed_tests: Risk Profiler page (/risk-profiler) loads with data-testid='risk-profiler-page'
Risk Profiler shows 'Answer 8 questions to determine your investment risk profile'
Risk Profiler Question 1 shows 'Investment Timeframe' category with 5 radio options
Risk Profiler navigation works - Previous/Next buttons functional
Risk Profiler completes all 8 questions successfully
Risk Profiler results page shows with data-testid='risk-profiler-results'
Risk Profiler results show profile name (Balanced for middle answers)
Risk Profiler results show Score: 24/40, Risk Level: 3/5
Risk Profiler results show Expected Return: 6-8% p.a.
Risk Profiler results show Defensive/Growth allocation (30%/70%)
Risk Profiler results show Recommended Asset Allocation pie chart
Risk Profiler results show Risk Profile Analysis radar chart
Risk Profiler results show Risk Profile Scale (Conservative to High Growth)
Risk Profiler has Retake, Export, Save Profile buttons
BAS Calculator page (/bas-calculator) loads with data-testid='bas-calculator-page'
BAS Calculator shows period selector (Oct-Dec 2024 Q2)
BAS Calculator shows due date alert with OVERDUE badge
BAS Calculator has Data Source options: Manual Entry, Xero, MYOB
BAS Calculator has summary cards: GST on Sales, GST on Purchases, Net GST, PAYG Withholding, Total Payable
BAS Calculator has 4 tabs: GST Worksheet, PAYG Withholding, PAYG Instalments, Summary
BAS Calculator GST Worksheet shows G1-G7 fields for GST on Sales
BAS Calculator GST Worksheet shows G10-G18 fields for GST on Purchases
BAS Calculator PAYG Withholding tab shows W1-W5 fields
BAS Calculator PAYG Instalments tab shows T7, T8, T9, T11 fields
BAS Calculator Summary tab shows BAS Summary with period and due date
BAS Calculator Summary shows 1A GST on sales, 1B GST on purchases, Net GST, PAYG tax withheld, PAYG instalment
BAS Calculator has Export, Calculate, Print, Lodge via ATO buttons
Collaboration page (/collaboration) loads with data-testid='collaboration-page'
Collaboration shows Demo Mode notice
Collaboration shows '2 Online' badge and 'Invite Member' button
Collaboration has 4 tabs: Team (4), Activity, Notes (2), Permissions
Collaboration Team tab shows 4 team members with avatars, emails, roles
Collaboration Team tab shows John Wheeler (Administrator), Sarah Wheeler (Client), David Chen (Financial Adviser), Emma Thompson (Accountant)
Collaboration Team tab shows role dropdown and delete buttons for non-current users
Collaboration Activity tab shows Recent Activity with activity log entries
Collaboration Notes tab shows Add Note section with section selector
Collaboration Permissions tab shows Role Permissions matrix
Collaboration Permissions shows 5 roles and 11 permission types
Statement of Advice page (/statement-of-advice) loads with data-testid='soa-page'
SOA shows Document Completion progress bar (71%)
SOA shows Regulatory Compliance notice with ASIC RG 175 reference
SOA has 2 tabs: Create SOA, Saved (0)
SOA has 8 sections: Client Details, Goals & Objectives, Risk Profile, Current Situation, Recommendations, Projections, Fees & Disclosure, Authority to Proceed
SOA Client Details form shows pre-filled data (James Wheeler, Sarah Wheeler, 2 dependents)
SOA has Generate SOA button
Sidebar has 'Adviser Tools' section with Collaboration and SOA Generator links
Sidebar has Risk Profiler in Planning section
Sidebar has BAS Calculator in Tax & CGT section
Navigation links have correct data-testid attributes (nav-risk-profiler, nav-bas-calculator, nav-collaboration, nav-statement-of-advice)
action_items: Sidebar scroll position preservation still not working - setTimeout(20ms) fix may need longer delay or different approach (requestAnimationFrame with multiple retries)
critical_code_review_comments: RiskProfiler.jsx implements ASIC/FSC aligned 8-question questionnaire with proper scoring and profile calculation
BASCalculator.jsx implements comprehensive GST worksheet with G1-G20 fields matching ATO BAS form
Collaboration.jsx implements demo mode with team management, activity log, notes, and permissions matrix
StatementOfAdvice.jsx implements RG 175 compliant SOA generator with 8 sections
Layout.jsx sidebar scroll preservation has timing issue - scroll position resets to 0 after navigation despite setTimeout(20ms) fix
All new pages have proper data-testid attributes for testing
All features clearly marked as demo/sandbox mode where applicable

success_rate.frontend: 98% (All features working, minor sidebar scroll issue persists)

seed_data_creation: No seed data created - uses localStorage and mock data defined in components
context_for_next_testing_agent: Tested new features: 1) Risk Profiler at /risk-profiler - 8-question ASIC/FSC aligned questionnaire with 5 risk profiles (Conservative, Moderately Conservative, Balanced, Growth, High Growth), shows score, risk level, expected return, asset allocation pie chart, radar chart analysis, 2) BAS Calculator at /bas-calculator - GST worksheet (G1-G20), PAYG Withholding (W1-W5), PAYG Instalments (T7-T11), Summary with ATO lodgement link, supports Xero/MYOB import, 3) Collaboration at /collaboration - Demo mode team management with 4 mock users, activity log, notes system, permissions matrix for 5 roles, 4) Statement of Advice at /statement-of-advice - RG 175 compliant SOA generator with 8 sections (Client Details, Goals, Risk Profile, Current Situation, Recommendations, Projections, Fees, Authority), 71% completion progress. Sidebar has new 'Adviser Tools' section. Minor issue: sidebar scroll position still resets on navigation.

mocked_apis.Risk Profiler: Frontend-only - no API, uses localStorage for saved profiles
mocked_apis.BAS Calculator: Frontend-only - mock data for Xero/MYOB import
mocked_apis.Collaboration: DEMO MODE - mock team members and activity log
mocked_apis.Statement of Advice: Frontend-only - generates text file SOA document

components: 8-question questionnaire (Investment Timeframe, Knowledge, Risk Tolerance, Return vs Security, Income Needs, Financial Stability, Portfolio Scenario, Loss Acceptance)
5 risk profiles (Conservative, Moderately Conservative, Balanced, Growth, High Growth)
Asset Allocation pie chart (cash, fixed income, property, australian shares, international shares)
Due date alert with OVERDUE badge
Data Source options (Manual Entry, Xero, MYOB)
Summary cards (GST on Sales, GST on Purchases, Net GST, PAYG Withholding, Total Payable)
GST Worksheet tab (G1-G7 Sales, G10-G18 Purchases)
PAYG Instalments tab (T7, T8, T9, T11)
Export, Calculate, Print, Lodge via ATO buttons
Role dropdown (Administrator, Financial Adviser, Accountant, Client, View Only)
Notes tab with Add Note form
Permissions tab with role permissions matrix
Client Details form with pre-filled data
Adviser Tools section with Collaboration and SOA Generator
BAS Calculator in Tax & CGT section
sidebar_navigation.minor_issue: Scroll position resets on navigation despite setTimeout(20ms) fix
